channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Bill Cassidy eliminated from Louisiana Senate primary as Letlow and Fleming advance to runoff
item.description: In the 2026 Louisiana Republican Senate primary, incumbent Senator Bill Cassidy failed to secure enough support to reach the runoff, marking a significant political setback. Cassidy, who faced critici...

item.title: Napoleon Solo Wins the Preakness Stakes at Laurel Park, Defeating Iron Honor
item.description: Napoleon Solo claimed victory in the Preakness Stakes at Laurel Park, holding off Iron Honor by 1 1/4 lengths. This marked his first win of the year after two fifth-place finishes in earlier races. Wi...

item.title: U.S. prosecutors link Iraqi national to Toronto U.S. consulate shooting and other attacks as part of Iranian-backed network
item.description: U.S. prosecutors have connected an Iraqi national, Mohammad Baqer Saad Dawood Al-Saadi, to a shooting outside the U.S. consulate in downtown Toronto on March 10, 2026. Al-Saadi, who holds senior roles...

item.title: Quebec Premier Christine Fréchette Visits Paris to Strengthen Economic Ties with France
item.description: Quebec Premier Christine Fréchette has embarked on an official visit to Paris, where she is scheduled to meet French President Emmanuel Macron at the Élysée Palace. The mission, running until May 20, ...

item.title: Mike Sonko Shares Health Check-Up Results; Ngina Kenyatta's Green Experience Restaurant Detailed
item.description: This week, TUKO.co.ke highlighted some of the major celebrity stories in Kenya. Former Nairobi Governor Mike Sonko went public with his HIV status after undergoing routine medical tests as part of his...

item.title: Elderly Andhra couple forcibly removed during protest over airport land compensation
item.description: In Andhra Pradesh’s Vizianagaram district, an elderly couple, Baireddy Appala Narasaiah and Gouthamma, both in their sixties, were forcibly lifted in an excavator bucket during a protest against the g...

item.title: Akwa Ibom State to Deploy 64-Seat Ferry at Oron Marine Terminal by June
item.description: The Akwa Ibom State Government don confirm say the 64-seat passenger and cargo ferry wey dem dey build for Nigerian Navy Shipyard, Port Harcourt, go ready for delivery and test run before June 2026 fi...

item.title: O-Train Line 1 and Line 4 temporarily suspended due to staffing shortages
item.description: On Saturday, Ottawa's O-Train transit system faced significant disruptions when Line 1 service was suspended just hours after Line 4 halted, both due to staffing shortages. Commuters experienced delay...

item.title: Teenage Sprinter Miracle Ezechukwu Targets 100m and Relay Golds at African Championships
item.description: Teenage Nigerian athlete, Miracle Ezechukwu, don set her mind to grab both the 100 metres and 4x100 metres relay titles for the 24th African Athletics Championships wey dey Accra, Ghana. The young spr...

item.title: DOH Staff Show Strong Backing for Secretary Herbosa Amid Healthcare Reforms
item.description: A large group of Department of Health (DOH) employees has publicly expressed their support for Secretary Teodoro 'Ted' Herbosa as he continues to implement reforms in the Philippine healthcare system....

item.title: Ensuring Lenacapavir Enhances Comprehensive HIV Prevention in South Africa
item.description: South Africa has introduced lenacapavir, a long-acting injectable HIV pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP), marking an important step in expanding prevention options for people at risk of HIV. This innovat...

item.title: The Life and Legacy of Norman Hartnell, Royal Fashion Icon
item.description: Sir Norman Hartnell (1901–1979) was a pioneering British fashion designer, renowned as the principal dressmaker for Queen Elizabeth II and the Queen Mother. His career peaked with the creation of two ...

item.title: Montreal Victoire takes 2-0 lead over Ottawa Charge in Walter Cup Finals
item.description: In an intense overtime showdown, the Montreal Victoire defeated the Ottawa Charge 2-1 in Game 2 of the Professional Women’s Hockey League’s Walter Cup finals on Saturday in Laval, Quebec. Maggie Flahe...

item.title: INEC officials missing during Surulere Constituency 11 APC primary elections
item.description: During the APC primary election for Surulere Constituency 11, all the officials from the Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) were absent, causing serious concern among party members. The ...

item.title: MTN launches Pi, a flexible digital service for mobile and home connectivity
item.description: MTN has introduced Pi, a digital-first connectivity service in South Africa that allows customers to manage both mobile and home internet via a single app or web account. Pi is designed to give users ...

item.title: Aaron Rodgers Signs One-Year Contract to Return to Pittsburgh Steelers
item.description: Aaron Rodgers, the four-time NFL MVP, has agreed to a one-year contract to return to the Pittsburgh Steelers, ending a lengthy decision-making period. At 42 years old, Rodgers led the Steelers to an A...

item.title: Former Trump Border Patrol Official Criticizes DHS and Administration Over Immigration Policy
item.description: Greg Bovino, a former high-ranking Border Patrol official during the Trump administration, publicly criticized his former employers and the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for obstructing strict...

item.title: Air India reduces international flights due to geopolitical tensions and rising costs
item.description: Air India has announced substantial cuts to its international flight operations between June and August, with a 40% reduction in flights to North America and overall international operations down by 2...

item.title: Audi A5 Review: A Glamorous Yet Less Practical Successor to the A4
item.description: Audi’s decision to retire the A4 after decades of popularity has left many loyal buyers feeling a bit short-changed. The new 2026 A5 steps in to fill the gap, but it is a very different beast. Histori...

item.title: Lessons for UDA on Managing Political Alliances and Public Patience
item.description: Governor Irungu Kang’ata of Murang’a County shares insights for UDA on practical politics, emphasising the importance of keeping political coalitions intact rather than purging rivals. He compares pol...
